message:
feat(fcp-host): add signal handling for graceful shutdown and config reload

SIGHUP triggers live connector config reload (re-read file, apply_configs
diff, reconcile lifecycle). SIGTERM/SIGINT trigger graceful shutdown via
watch channel that interrupts accept loops. Non-unix fallback handles
Ctrl+C. Uses signal-hook + signal-hook-tokio crates.

Addresses oip0 acceptance criterion: "Configuration reload (SIGHUP)"

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
